## Goal

Implement ranking snapshots, reader vote input, notifications, and auditability basics.

## Source IDs

Business Rules:
- BR-RANK-001 to BR-RANK-013
- BR-VOTE-INPUT-001 to BR-VOTE-INPUT-009
- BR-NOTIF-001 to BR-NOTIF-013
- BR-HIST-001 to BR-HIST-008

Functional Requirements:
- FR-RANK-001 to FR-RANK-013
- FR-VOTE-INPUT-001 to FR-VOTE-INPUT-009
- FR-NOTIF-001 to FR-NOTIF-014
- FR-HIST-001 to FR-HIST-009

User Stories:
- US-MANGAKA-022
- US-EDITOR-015
- US-BOARD-006
- US-BOARD-008
- US-ADMIN-010 to US-ADMIN-012
- US-SYSADMIN-009
- US-SYSADMIN-010

## Description

Ranking snapshots are generated from simulated or manually aggregated reader vote input for released chapters. Notifications are in-app only and do not replace audit logs. Important workflow actions should be audit-log ready.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Reader vote input is allowed only for released chapters.
- [ ] Vote counts and feedback counts cannot be negative.
- [ ] Average rating stays within valid range.
- [ ] Ranking snapshots are generated by period.
- [ ] Current rank is derived from latest relevant snapshot.
- [ ] High cancellation risk can trigger notifications.
- [ ] Notifications can be marked read.
- [ ] Important workflow actions are audit-log ready.
- [ ] No separate status-history tables are required for every entity.

## Out of Scope

- Public reader portal.
- Email/push notifications.
- Separate status-history tables for every entity.
